super_heavy_cut_300.description_subtitle: The ultimate abrasive polish for maximum sanding removal further improved
super_heavy_cut_300.description_subtitle_en: The ultimate abrasive polish for maximum sanding removal further improved
super_heavy_cut_300.description_text: Tthe ultimate sanding polish for modern automotive clear coats with maximum sanding effect and the latest technology. SHCC 300 iF removes P1200 grit sanding marks and signs of usage in the shortest time possible without damaging the surface. Without aggressive solvents.
super_heavy_cut_300.description_text_en: Tthe ultimate sanding polish for modern automotive clear coats with maximum sanding effect and the latest technology. SHCC 300 iF removes P1200 grit sanding marks and signs of usage in the shortest time possible without damaging the surface. Without aggressive solvents.

optimised_for.name: Double Sided Lambswool Pad
optimised_for.name_tr: Çift Taraflı Kuzu Yünü Polisaj Keçesi

benefits: Exceptionally quick removal of sanding marks
Reliable removal of very deep scratches
A little goes a long way
benefits_en: Exceptionally quick removal of sanding marks
Reliable removal of very deep scratches
A little goes a long way

heavy_cut_400_green.description_subtitle: An innovative automotive polish that removes scratches and creates gloss without hazardous solvents
heavy_cut_400_green.description_subtitle_en: An innovative automotive polish that removes scratches and creates gloss without hazardous solvents
heavy_cut_400_green.description_text: This VOC-free automotive polish removes sanding marks and leaves behind a glossy finish, all in a single step. It quickly removes scratches in the car paint and ensures optimum polishing results, without any annoying odors. This automotive polish is VOC-free pursuant to DIN EN ISO 11890-2 and does not contain any hazardous volatile solvents. The diminishing abrasives enable pleasant working, all the way through to the finish.
heavy_cut_400_green.description_text_en: This VOC-free automotive polish removes sanding marks and leaves behind a glossy finish, all in a single step. It quickly removes scratches in the car paint and ensures optimum polishing results, without any annoying odors. This automotive polish is VOC-free pursuant to DIN EN ISO 11890-2 and does not contain any hazardous volatile solvents. The diminishing abrasives enable pleasant working, all the way through to the finish.

processing.orbital: Lower to upper rotational speed range

optimised_for.name: Double Sided Lambswool Pad
optimised_for.name_tr: Çift Taraflı Kuzu Yünü Polisaj Keçesi

benefits: A little goes a long way
Derin araba boyası çiziklerinin hızlı giderimi
VOC-free pursuant to DIN EN ISO 11890-2
benefits_en: A little goes a long way
Speedy removal of deep car paint scratches
VOC-free pursuant to DIN EN ISO 11890-2
recommended_usage: Yüzeyi iyice temizleyin.
Şişeyi çalkalayın ve pastayı polisaj süngeri/keçesine uygulayın.
Use either a rotary or an orbital polishing machine and use the cross-coating method.
Start by polishing at a low rotational speed while exerting strong pressure. Take away the pressure in the final cycles and increase the speed of the polishing machine.
Başlangıçta pasta biraz sütümsü görünecek ve yalnızca hafif şeffaf/yağlı bir film görünene kadar çalışılmalıdır.
Polisajı bitirdikten sonra kalan kalıntıları Premium mikrofiber bez ile temizleyin.
Depending on the demands of the surface, a second stage may be performed. Here, you have the option of reapplying Menzerna HCC 400 Green Line or using a Menzerna Finish polish.
recommended_usage_en: Clean the surface thoroughly.
Shake the bottle and apply the polish to the polishing pad.
Use either a rotary or an orbital polishing machine and use the cross-coating method.
Start by polishing at a low rotational speed while exerting strong pressure. Take away the pressure in the final cycles and increase the speed of the polishing machine.
At first, the polish will seem a little milky and should be worked in until only a slightly transparent/oily film is visible.
Once you have finished polishing, remove any residue with the Premium microfiber cloth.
Depending on the demands of the surface, a second stage may be performed. Here, you have the option of reapplying Menzerna HCC 400 Green Line or using a Menzerna Finish polish.

heavy_cut_400.description_subtitle: Tek adımda çizikleri giderir ve parlaklık oluşturan yenilikçi bir otomotiv cilası
heavy_cut_400.description_subtitle_en: An innovative automotive polish that removes scratches and creates gloss in a single step
heavy_cut_400.description_text: Otomotiv şeffaf katları için profesyonel pasta – yeni ve geliştirilmiş formülü ile – her zaman pırıl pırıl bir izlenim bırakır. Detaycıların favori pastası olarak, rekor sürede zımpara izlerini giderir, araçtaki çizikleri hızla temizler ve cilaya kadar parlaklık oluşturur. Azalan aşındırıcılarla son teknoloji polisaj teknolojisi sayesinde.
heavy_cut_400.description_text_en: The professional polish for automotive clear coats – with a new and improved formula – always leaves a glistening impression. As the detailers’ favorite polish, it eliminates sanding marks in record time, quickly removes scratches on the car, and generates gloss all the way to the finish. Thanks to cutting-edge polishing technology with diminishing abrasives.

processing.orbital: Lower to upper rotational speed range

optimised_for.name: Double Sided Lambswool Pad
optimised_for.name_tr: Çift Taraflı Kuzu Yünü Polisaj Keçesi

benefits: Tek adımda parlatır ve parlaklık oluşturur
Tek aşamalı çalışma sayesinde zaman kazandırır (kesimden cilaya)
Derin araba boyası çiziklerinin hızlı giderimi
benefits_en: Polishes and generates gloss in a single step
Saves time thanks to single-stage working (cut to finish)
Speedy removal of deep car paint scratches
recommended_usage: Yüzeyi iyice temizleyin.
Şişeyi çalkalayın ve pastayı polisaj süngeri/keçesine uygulayın.
Rotary veya orbital polisaj makinesi kullanın ve çapraz kaplama yöntemini uygulayın. Güçlü baskı yaparak düşük devir hızında polisaja başlayın.
Son turlarda baskıyı azaltın ve polisaj makinesinin hızını artırın.
Başlangıçta pasta biraz sütümsü görünecek ve yalnızca hafif şeffaf/yağlı bir film görünene kadar çalışılmalıdır.
Polisajı bitirdikten sonra kalan kalıntıları Premium mikrofiber bez ile temizleyin.
Yüzeyin durumuna bağlı olarak ikinci bir aşama uygulanabilir. Burada Menzerna HCC 400'ü yeniden uygulama veya Menzerna Finish cilası kullanma seçeneğiniz vardır.
recommended_usage_en: Clean the surface thoroughly.
Shake the bottle and apply the polish to the polishing pad.
Use either a rotary or an orbital polishing machine and use the cross-coating method. Start by polishing at a low rotational speed while exerting strong pressure.
Take away the pressure in the final cycles and increase the speed of the polishing machine.
At first, the polish will seem a little milky and should be worked in until only a slightly transparent/oily film is visible.
Once you have finished polishing, remove any residue with the Premium microfiber cloth.
Depending on the demands of the surface, a second stage may be performed. Here, you have the option of reapplying Menzerna HCC 400 or using a Menzerna Finish polish.

cut_force_pro.description_subtitle: The Gold Standard in Paint Repair
cut_force_pro.description_subtitle_en: The Gold Standard in Paint Repair
cut_force_pro.description_text: The high-performance polish in a class of its own. Powerfully removes scratches, sanding and wear marks at top speed. Innovative polishing technology from the Menzerna laboratory ensures maximum removal while maintaining excellent gloss. The polish takes paint repair to a new level, restores the shine to heavily used clear coats and creates a noble deep gloss.
cut_force_pro.description_text_en: The high-performance polish in a class of its own. Powerfully removes scratches, sanding and wear marks at top speed. Innovative polishing technology from the Menzerna laboratory ensures maximum removal while maintaining excellent gloss. The polish takes paint repair to a new level, restores the shine to heavily used clear coats and creates a noble deep gloss.

processing.orbital: Start: Lower rotational speed range -> End: higher rotational speed range

optimised_for.name: Double Sided Lambswool Pad
optimised_for.name_tr: Çift Taraflı Kuzu Yünü Polisaj Keçesi

benefits: restores the shine to even heavily stressed clear coats
benefits_en: restores the shine to even heavily stressed clear coats
recommended_usage: Clean surface thoroughly
Shake bottle and apply 3 (ø95 mm) - 7 (ø180 mm) pea-sized drops of polish to the polishing pad or lambskin, depending on pad size.
Use either a rotary or eccentric polishing machine and use the cross-coating method.
While polishing, apply strong, even pressure and run the product out at a consistent low speed.
Başlangıçta pasta biraz sütümsü görünecek ve yalnızca hafif şeffaf/yağlı bir film görünene kadar çalışılmalıdır.
After polishing, remove polish residues with the premium microfiber cloth.

Depending on the demands of the surface, a second stage may be performed to achieve a high-gloss surface. Here, you have the option of reapplying the Menzerna Cut Force Pro or a Menzerna Finish. In both cases in combination with the Menzerna Soft Cut Foam Pad
recommended_usage_en: Clean surface thoroughly

While polishing, apply strong, even pressure and run the product out at a consistent low speed.
At first, the polish will seem a little milky and should be worked in until only a slightly transparent/oily film is visible.
After polishing, remove polish residues with the premium microfiber cloth.

Depending on the demands of the surface, a second stage may be performed to achieve a high-gloss surface. Here, you have the option of reapplying the Menzerna Cut Force Pro or a Menzerna Finish. In both cases in combination with the Menzerna Soft Cut Foam Pad

heavy_cut_1000.description_subtitle: Car polish for the speedy removal of deep scratches using foam polishing pads
heavy_cut_1000.description_subtitle_en: Car polish for the speedy removal of deep scratches using foam polishing pads
heavy_cut_1000.description_text: This powerful polish quickly and thoroughly removes scratches in car paint, scrapes, spray, and heavy signs of use. The Menzerna automotive polish for the speedy removal of sanding marks. Optimized for use with foam polishing pads. Guaranteed best value in the Heavy Cut segment. The new, improved formulation now provides even more cut and quicker results!
heavy_cut_1000.description_text_en: This powerful polish quickly and thoroughly removes scratches in car paint, scrapes, spray, and heavy signs of use. The Menzerna automotive polish for the speedy removal of sanding marks. Optimized for use with foam polishing pads. Guaranteed best value in the Heavy Cut segment. The new, improved formulation now provides even more cut and quicker results!
benefits: A little goes a long way
benefits_en: A little goes a long way
recommended_usage: Yüzeyi iyice temizleyin.
Shake the bottle and apply the polish to the Menzerna Heavy Cut Foam Pad.
Use either a rotary or an orbital polishing machine and use the cross-coating method.
Exert strong and even pressure while polishing and apply the product with a consistently low rotational speed.
Başlangıçta pasta biraz sütümsü görünecek ve yalnızca hafif şeffaf/yağlı bir film görünene kadar çalışılmalıdır.
Polisajı bitirdikten sonra kalan kalıntıları Premium mikrofiber bez ile temizleyin.
Any signs of sanding and use have now been removed. For an exceptionally glossy finish, now apply a Menzerna Medium Cut polish and a Menzerna Finish polish.
recommended_usage_en: Clean the surface thoroughly.
Shake the bottle and apply the polish to the Menzerna Heavy Cut Foam Pad.
Use either a rotary or an orbital polishing machine and use the cross-coating method.
Exert strong and even pressure while polishing and apply the product with a consistently low rotational speed.
At first, the polish will seem a little milky and should be worked in until only a slightly transparent/oily film is visible.
Once you have finished polishing, remove any residue with the Premium microfiber cloth.
Any signs of sanding and use have now been removed. For an exceptionally glossy finish, now apply a Menzerna Medium Cut polish and a Menzerna Finish polish.

heavy_cut_1100.description_subtitle: Car polish for the speedy removal of deep scratches using lambswool polishing pads
heavy_cut_1100.description_subtitle_en: Car polish for the speedy removal of deep scratches using lambswool polishing pads
heavy_cut_1100.description_text: A gentle yet powerful secret weapon in the fight against scratches and heavy signs of use. This abrasive polish removes car paint scratches quickly and permanently. Optimized for use with lambswool polishing pads.
heavy_cut_1100.description_text_en: A gentle yet powerful secret weapon in the fight against scratches and heavy signs of use. This abrasive polish removes car paint scratches quickly and permanently. Optimized for use with lambswool polishing pads.

A little goes a long way

A little goes a long way

Shake the bottle and apply the polish to a Menzerna lambswool polishing pad.
Use either a rotary or an orbital polishing machine and use the cross-coating method.
Exert strong and even pressure while polishing and apply the product with a consistently low rotational speed.
Başlangıçta pasta biraz sütümsü görünecek ve yalnızca hafif şeffaf/yağlı bir film görünene kadar çalışılmalıdır.
Once you have finished polishing, remove any residue with a Premium microfiber cloth, without applying any pressure.
Any signs of sanding and use have now been removed. For an exceptionally glossy finish, now apply a Menzerna Medium Cut polish and a Menzerna Finish polish.

medium_cut_2500.description_subtitle: A glossy fine abrasive polish for the removal of moderately deep scratches
medium_cut_2500.description_subtitle_en: A glossy fine abrasive polish for the removal of moderately deep scratches
medium_cut_2500.description_text: This Medium Cut polish offers the ideal combination of sanding mark removal and gloss on automotive clear coats. Ideally suited for the polishing of moderately deep scratches and the removal of signs of use. Exceptional gloss as standard.
medium_cut_2500.description_text_en: This Medium Cut polish offers the ideal combination of sanding mark removal and gloss on automotive clear coats. Ideally suited for the polishing of moderately deep scratches and the removal of signs of use. Exceptional gloss as standard.
benefits: Reliable removal of moderately deep paint scratches and signs of use
benefits_en: Reliable removal of moderately deep paint scratches and signs of use
recommended_usage: Yüzeyi iyice temizleyin.
Shake the bottle and apply the polish to the Medium Cut Foam Pad.
Use either a rotary or an orbital polishing machine and use the cross-coating method.
Exert moderate and even pressure while polishing and apply the product with a consistently moderate rotational speed.
Başlangıçta pasta biraz sütümsü görünecek ve yalnızca hafif şeffaf/yağlı bir film görünene kadar çalışılmalıdır.
Polisajı bitirdikten sonra kalan kalıntıları Premium mikrofiber bez ile temizleyin.
Scratches, sanding marks and signs of use/washing have now been removed. Now use a Menzerna Finish polish to remove any holograms.

Shake the bottle and apply the polish to the Medium Cut Foam Pad.
Use either a rotary or an orbital polishing machine and use the cross-coating method.

Scratches, sanding marks and signs of use/washing have now been removed. Now use a Menzerna Finish polish to remove any holograms.

medium_cut_2200.description_subtitle: A liquid fine abrasive polish for the removal of moderately deep scratches
medium_cut_2200.description_subtitle_en: A liquid fine abrasive polish for the removal of moderately deep scratches
medium_cut_2200.description_text: The best Medium Cut polish for fluid working on older dry paint systems or extremely soft coats (“sticky paint”). Car wash scratches, as well as moderately deep and fine scratches in the car paint, are swiftly taken care of. Improved agility ensures ease of use and glistening results.
medium_cut_2200.description_text_en: The best Medium Cut polish for fluid working on older dry paint systems or extremely soft coats (“sticky paint”). Car wash scratches, as well as moderately deep and fine scratches in the car paint, are swiftly taken care of. Improved agility ensures ease of use and glistening results.
benefits: Liquid formula facilitates ease of use on older dry finishes.
Suitable for dry, hard, and older coats (classic cars)
Reliable removal of moderately deep paint scratches and signs of use
benefits_en: Liquid formula facilitates ease of use on older dry finishes.
Suitable for dry, hard, and older coats (classic cars)
Reliable removal of moderately deep paint scratches and signs of use

Shake the bottle and apply the polish to the Medium Cut Foam Pad.
Use either a rotary or an orbital polishing machine and use the cross-coating method. The polish can also be applied by hand using the Hand Polishing Applicator.
Exert moderate and even pressure while polishing and apply the product with a consistently moderate rotational speed.
Başlangıçta pasta biraz sütümsü görünecek ve yalnızca hafif şeffaf/yağlı bir film görünene kadar çalışılmalıdır.

At first, the polish will seem a little milky and should be worked in until only a slightly transparent/oily film is visible.
Once you have finished polishing, remove any residue with the Premium microfiber cloth.

super_finish_3500.description_subtitle: High-gloss polish for a perfect mirror finish
super_finish_3500.description_subtitle_en: High-gloss polish for a perfect mirror finish
super_finish_3500.description_text: This world-beating polish removes polishing marks, micro scratches, and holograms to ensure a flawless mirror finish. On account of its dark color, this high-gloss polish is particularly ideal for polishing black and other dark car coats.
super_finish_3500.description_text_en: This world-beating polish removes polishing marks, micro scratches, and holograms to ensure a flawless mirror finish. On account of its dark color, this high-gloss polish is particularly ideal for polishing black and other dark car coats.
benefits: Anti-hologram polish for the removal of gray smears and holograms
benefits_en: Anti-hologram polish for the removal of gray smears and holograms
recommended_usage: Yüzeyi iyice temizleyin.
Shake the bottle and apply the polish to the Soft Cut Foam Pad.
We recommend an orbital polishing machine and the cross-coating method to achieve a perfect finish. The polish can also be applied by hand using the Hand Polishing Applicator.
Exert light and even pressure while polishing and apply the product with a consistently high rotational speed.
Başlangıçta pasta biraz sütümsü görünecek ve yalnızca hafif şeffaf/yağlı bir film görünene kadar çalışılmalıdır.
Polisajı bitirdikten sonra kalan kalıntıları Premium mikrofiber bez ile temizleyin.
Fine scratches, shading, smears and holograms have now been removed. The car coat can now be sealed with a Menzerna Protection product.
recommended_usage_en: Clean the surface thoroughly.
Shake the bottle and apply the polish to the Soft Cut Foam Pad.
We recommend an orbital polishing machine and the cross-coating method to achieve a perfect finish. The polish can also be applied by hand using the Hand Polishing Applicator.
Exert light and even pressure while polishing and apply the product with a consistently high rotational speed.
At first, the polish will seem a little milky and should be worked in until only a slightly transparent/oily film is visible.
Once you have finished polishing, remove any residue with the Premium microfiber cloth.
Fine scratches, shading, smears and holograms have now been removed. The car coat can now be sealed with a Menzerna Protection product.

super_finish_3800.description_subtitle: High-gloss polish for maximum deep shine
super_finish_3800.description_subtitle_en: High-gloss polish for maximum deep shine
super_finish_3800.description_text: This automotive polish boasts genuine star quality and polishes micro scratches and holograms for sparkling performance. It is the perfect choice when it comes to achieving maximum high gloss for black/dark coats.
super_finish_3800.description_text_en: This automotive polish boasts genuine star quality and polishes micro scratches and holograms for sparkling performance. It is the perfect choice when it comes to achieving maximum high gloss for black/dark coats.
benefits: Anti-hologram polish for the removal of gray smears and holograms
benefits_en: Anti-hologram polish for the removal of gray smears and holograms
recommended_usage: Yüzeyi iyice temizleyin.
Shake the bottle and apply the polish to the Soft Cut Foam Pad.
We recommend an orbital polishing machine and the cross-coating method to achieve a perfect finish. The polish can also be applied by hand using the Hand Polishing Applicator.
Exert light and even pressure while polishing and apply the product with a consistently high rotational speed.
Başlangıçta pasta biraz sütümsü görünecek ve yalnızca hafif şeffaf/yağlı bir film görünene kadar çalışılmalıdır.
Polisajı bitirdikten sonra kalan kalıntıları Premium mikrofiber bez ile temizleyin.
Fine scratches, shading, smears and holograms have now been removed. The car coat can now be sealed with a Menzerna Protection product.
recommended_usage_en: Clean the surface thoroughly.
Shake the bottle and apply the polish to the Soft Cut Foam Pad.
We recommend an orbital polishing machine and the cross-coating method to achieve a perfect finish. The polish can also be applied by hand using the Hand Polishing Applicator.
Exert light and even pressure while polishing and apply the product with a consistently high rotational speed.
At first, the polish will seem a little milky and should be worked in until only a slightly transparent/oily film is visible.
Once you have finished polishing, remove any residue with the Premium microfiber cloth.
Fine scratches, shading, smears and holograms have now been removed. The car coat can now be sealed with a Menzerna Protection product.

final_finish_3000.description_subtitle: Classic high-gloss polish for a brilliant finish
final_finish_3000.description_subtitle_en: Classic high-gloss polish for a brilliant finish
final_finish_3000.description_text: This standard high-gloss polish removes swirls and car wash scratches with the utmost reliability and paves the way for exceptional automotive gloss.
final_finish_3000.description_text_en: This standard high-gloss polish removes swirls and car wash scratches with the utmost reliability and paves the way for exceptional automotive gloss.
benefits: Anti-hologram polish for the removal of gray smears and holograms

Shake the bottle and apply the polish to the Soft Cut Foam Pad.
We recommend an orbital polishing machine and the cross-coating method to achieve a perfect finish. The polish can also be applied by hand using the Hand Polishing Applicator.
Exert light and even pressure while polishing and apply the product with a consistently high rotational speed.

Fine scratches, shading, smears and holograms have now been removed. The car coat can now be sealed with a Menzerna Protection product.

one_step_3in1.description_subtitle: Medium Cut polish – high-gloss finish and seal in one
one_step_3in1.description_subtitle_en: Medium Cut polish – high-gloss finish and seal in one
one_step_3in1.description_text: An unbeatable all-arounder. Polish out sanding marks caused by 3000 grit, reliably remove smears, swirls, and shadows, and protect the high-gloss finish – all with a single product. This one-step polish combines speed and simplicity, making it ideal for novice polishers and the detailing of used and year-old vehicles.
one_step_3in1.description_text_en: An unbeatable all-arounder. Polish out sanding marks caused by 3000 grit, reliably remove smears, swirls, and shadows, and protect the high-gloss finish – all with a single product. This one-step polish combines speed and simplicity, making it ideal for novice polishers and the detailing of used and year-old vehicles.

processing.orbital: Medium to lower rotational speed range

benefits: One-step polish: Polish, finish, and seal
benefits_en: One-step polish: Polish, finish, and seal
recommended_usage: Yüzeyi iyice temizleyin.
Shake the bottle before use and apply the polish to the Medium Cut Foam Pad.
We recommend a rotary or orbital polishing machine and the cross-coating method to achieve a perfect result. The polish can also be applied by hand using the Hand Polishing Applicator.

While polishing, exert moderately strong pressure to begin with, using the medium rotational speed range of the polishing machine. Reduce the pressure and the rotational speed during the final cycles.
At first, the polish will seem a little greasy and should be worked in until only a slightly transparent/oily film is visible.
Following application: Leave OSP 3in1 to dry for 5 to 10 minutes and remove any residual polish with the Premium microfiber cloth, without applying any pressure.
Depending on the demands of the surface, the 3in1 product can be reapplied using the Wax Foam Pad in order to achieve an even better finish.
recommended_usage_en: Clean the surface thoroughly.
Shake the bottle before use and apply the polish to the Medium Cut Foam Pad.
We recommend a rotary or orbital polishing machine and the cross-coating method to achieve a perfect result. The polish can also be applied by hand using the Hand Polishing Applicator.

While polishing, exert moderately strong pressure to begin with, using the medium rotational speed range of the polishing machine. Reduce the pressure and the rotational speed during the final cycles.
At first, the polish will seem a little greasy and should be worked in until only a slightly transparent/oily film is visible.
Following application: Leave OSP 3in1 to dry for 5 to 10 minutes and remove any residual polish with the Premium microfiber cloth, without applying any pressure.
Depending on the demands of the surface, the 3in1 product can be reapplied using the Wax Foam Pad in order to achieve an even better finish.

metal_polish.description_subtitle: Versatile Metal Polish: gloss for metal surfaces
metal_polish.description_subtitle_en: Versatile Metal Polish: gloss for metal surfaces
metal_polish.description_text: Metal Polish is suitable for all metallic surfaces. It is particularly ideal for polishing chrome. However, it also restores the luster of stainless steel, aluminum, copper, silver, and plastic. Menzerna Metal Polish is ideal when it comes to achieving a high-gloss finish for automotive accessories, household items, jewelry, and musical instruments. Quickly and easily removes deposits, tarnishes, and signs of use.
metal_polish.description_text_en: Metal Polish is suitable for all metallic surfaces. It is particularly ideal for polishing chrome. However, it also restores the luster of stainless steel, aluminum, copper, silver, and plastic. Menzerna Metal Polish is ideal when it comes to achieving a high-gloss finish for automotive accessories, household items, jewelry, and musical instruments. Quickly and easily removes deposits, tarnishes, and signs of use.

optimised_for.name: Double Sided Lambswool Pad
optimised_for.name_tr: Çift Taraflı Kuzu Yünü Polisaj Keçesi

benefits: Versatile range of applications at work, at home, and in leisure activities
benefits_en: Versatile range of applications at work, at home, and in leisure activities
recommended_usage: Metal Polish is used to clean and polish all metallic surfaces.
Clean the surface in question with Menzerna Control Cleaner.
Apply Metal Polish to a microfiber cloth or polishing pad and polish with circular motions.
Remove any residue with a clean, soft microfiber cloth.
recommended_usage_en: Metal Polish is used to clean and polish all metallic surfaces.
Clean the surface in question with Menzerna Control Cleaner.
Apply Metal Polish to a microfiber cloth or polishing pad and polish with circular motions.
Remove any residue with a clean, soft microfiber cloth.

gw18.description_subtitle: Speedy removal of scratches – without excessive buildup of heat – when polishing plastics
gw18.description_subtitle_en: Speedy removal of scratches – without excessive buildup of heat – when polishing plastics
gw18.description_text: GW18 quickly removes scratches and surface imperfections. Thanks to special grease binding, excess buildup of heat on plastic/painted surfaces is prevented.
gw18.description_text_en: GW18 quickly removes scratches and surface imperfections. Thanks to special grease binding, excess buildup of heat on plastic/painted surfaces is prevented.

p164.description_subtitle: Medium Cut polish for an exceptionally even finish
p164.description_subtitle_en: Medium Cut polish for an exceptionally even finish
p164.description_text: P164 is a universal polishing compound. It combines high gloss with an excellent cut. Results in an exceptionally even finish.
p164.description_text_en: P164 is a universal polishing compound. It combines high gloss with an excellent cut. Results in an exceptionally even finish.

p14f.description_subtitle: Fast polishing results and a broad range of applications
p14f.description_subtitle_en: Fast polishing results and a broad range of applications
p14f.description_text: P14F is a fast-acting polishing compound with excellent cut and a broad range of applications. It also ensures brilliant shine, all in a single stage.
p14f.description_text_en: P14F is a fast-acting polishing compound with excellent cut and a broad range of applications. It also ensures brilliant shine, all in a single stage.

gw16.description_subtitle: The flagship of the Menzerna solid polishing compounds
gw16.description_subtitle_en: The flagship of the Menzerna solid polishing compounds
gw16.description_text: GW16 is the flagship of the Menzerna solid polishing compound range. A one-step product that offers unbeatable abrasion and shine.
gw16.description_text_en: GW16 is the flagship of the Menzerna solid polishing compound range. A one-step product that offers unbeatable abrasion and shine.

480w.description_subtitle: A brilliant shine for brass surfaces
480w.description_subtitle_en: A brilliant shine for brass surfaces
480w.description_text: 480W is a fast-acting finishing compound with specially adapted grease bonding that offers a brilliant shine on brass surfaces.
480w.description_text_en: 480W is a fast-acting finishing compound with specially adapted grease bonding that offers a brilliant shine on brass surfaces.

495p.description_subtitle: Unbeatable luster for plastic, stainless steel, and paint
495p.description_subtitle_en: Unbeatable luster for plastic, stainless steel, and paint
495p.description_text: 495 P is a universal Finish compound. It generates superb luster on plastic. And is equally suited to nonferrous metals and painted surfaces.
495p.description_text_en: 495 P is a universal Finish compound. It generates superb luster on plastic. And is equally suited to nonferrous metals and painted surfaces.

p126.description_subtitle: A polish that delivers impeccable gloss in next to no time
p126.description_subtitle_en: A polish that delivers impeccable gloss in next to no time
p126.description_text: P126 is a Finish compound especially developed for stainless steel. It generates impeccable gloss in next to no time.
p126.description_text_en: P126 is a Finish compound especially developed for stainless steel. It generates impeccable gloss in next to no time.

p175.description_text: P175 is an ultra fine and versatile high-gloss compound. This polish generates a deep-gloss mirror finish.
p175.description_text_en: P175 is an ultra fine and versatile high-gloss compound. This polish generates a deep-gloss mirror finish.

m5.description_subtitle: Premium polishing results with this Super Finish polish
m5.description_subtitle_en: Premium polishing results with this Super Finish polish
m5.description_text: M5 is a Premium Super Finish compound. Top-class polishing materials result in premium polishing results with outstanding shine.
m5.description_text_en: M5 is a Premium Super Finish compound. Top-class polishing materials result in premium polishing results with outstanding shine.

heavy_cut_foam_pad.description_subtitle: Premium polishing pad for abrasive polishes
heavy_cut_foam_pad.description_subtitle_en: Premium polishing pad for abrasive polishes
heavy_cut_foam_pad.description_text: Polishing pad for use with highly abrasive polishes. Removes scratches, sanding marks, and surface imperfections in combination with Menzerna Heavy Cut polishes. The unique structure of the polishing foam, with powerful abrasion, supports the effect of high-performance Menzerna polishes to deliver reliable and ultra fast results.
heavy_cut_foam_pad.description_text_en: Polishing pad for use with highly abrasive polishes. Removes scratches, sanding marks, and surface imperfections in combination with Menzerna Heavy Cut polishes. The unique structure of the polishing foam, with powerful abrasion, supports the effect of high-performance Menzerna polishes to deliver reliable and ultra fast results.
benefits: Tailored to Menzerna Heavy Cut polishes
Durable, long-lasting foam (approx. 20 vehicles can be polished)
benefits_en: Tailored to Menzerna Heavy Cut polishes
Durable, long-lasting foam (approx. 20 vehicles can be polished)

medium_cut_foam_pad.description_subtitle: Premium polishing pad for fine abrasive polishes
medium_cut_foam_pad.description_subtitle_en: Premium polishing pad for fine abrasive polishes
medium_cut_foam_pad.description_text: Foam Pad for use with medium cut abrasive polishes. Removes slight scratches, holograms, and surface imperfections in combination with Menzerna Medium Cut polishes. The unique foam formulation delivers perfect cut and generates shine.
medium_cut_foam_pad.description_text_en: Foam Pad for use with medium cut abrasive polishes. Removes slight scratches, holograms, and surface imperfections in combination with Menzerna Medium Cut polishes. The unique foam formulation delivers perfect cut and generates shine.
benefits: Tailored to Menzerna Medium Cut polishes
Durable, long-lasting foam (approx. 20 vehicles can be polished)
benefits_en: Tailored to Menzerna Medium Cut polishes
Durable, long-lasting foam (approx. 20 vehicles can be polished)

orbital_wool.description_subtitle: Lambswool polishing pad for orbital polishing machines
orbital_wool.description_subtitle_en: Lambswool polishing pad for orbital polishing machines
orbital_wool.description_text: When used in combination with Menzerna Heavy Cut polishes, the Menzerna Orbital Wool Pad removes scratches, sanding marks, and deep surface imperfections in the blink of an eye. This Premium lambswool polishing pad comprises an abrasive woolen pad with a foam interface. The short-haired lambswool is ideal for removing scratches with orbital polishing machines.
orbital_wool.description_text_en: When used in combination with Menzerna Heavy Cut polishes, the Menzerna Orbital Wool Pad removes scratches, sanding marks, and deep surface imperfections in the blink of an eye. This Premium lambswool polishing pad comprises an abrasive woolen pad with a foam interface. The short-haired lambswool is ideal for removing scratches with orbital polishing machines.
benefits: Easy cleaning using a brush or compressed air
benefits_en: Easy cleaning using a brush or compressed air

crater_lambswool.description_subtitle: Crater-shaped lambswool polishing pad for rotary polishing machines
crater_lambswool.description_subtitle_en: Crater-shaped lambswool polishing pad for rotary polishing machines
crater_lambswool.description_text: The Crater-Shaped Lambswool Pad boasts high abrasion and is made from durable, high-quality lambswool. The polishing wool is ideal for polishing large surfaces and represents the perfect complement to Menzerna abrasive polishes. Deep scratches and imperfections are swiftly removed using rotary polishing machines.
crater_lambswool.description_text_en: The Crater-Shaped Lambswool Pad boasts high abrasion and is made from durable, high-quality lambswool. The polishing wool is ideal for polishing large surfaces and represents the perfect complement to Menzerna abrasive polishes. Deep scratches and imperfections are swiftly removed using rotary polishing machines.
benefits: Speedy removal of deep scratches and imperfections
Easy cleaning using a brush or compressed air
benefits_en: Speedy removal of deep scratches and imperfections
Easy cleaning using a brush or compressed air

premium_lambswool.description_subtitle: Lambswool polishing pad for rotary polishing machines
premium_lambswool.description_subtitle_en: Lambswool polishing pad for rotary polishing machines
premium_lambswool.description_text: This high-quality, abrasive lambswool polishing pad is ideal for use with Menzerna abrasive polishes. Deep scratches and imperfections can be easily removed using the Menzerna Premium Lambswool Pad. This natural lambswool pad combines high abrasion with low heat buildup. Made from high-quality lambswool and suitable for rotary polishing machines.
premium_lambswool.description_text_en: This high-quality, abrasive lambswool polishing pad is ideal for use with Menzerna abrasive polishes. Deep scratches and imperfections can be easily removed using the Menzerna Premium Lambswool Pad. This natural lambswool pad combines high abrasion with low heat buildup. Made from high-quality lambswool and suitable for rotary polishing machines.
benefits: Speedy removal of deep scratches and imperfections
Easy cleaning using a brush or compressed air
benefits_en: Speedy removal of deep scratches and imperfections
Easy cleaning using a brush or compressed air

ceramic_spray.description_subtitle: Universal spray sealant for all vehicles
ceramic_spray.description_subtitle_en: Universal spray sealant for all vehicles
ceramic_spray.description_text: Easy and quick to apply spray sealant with very high water-repellent effect. The spray sealant protects the surface from environmental influences and deposits and is extremely dirt-repellent. An unbeatable product for every user in all areas of vehicle detailing.
ceramic_spray.description_text_en: Easy and quick to apply spray sealant with very high water-repellent effect. The spray sealant protects the surface from environmental influences and deposits and is extremely dirt-repellent. An unbeatable product for every user in all areas of vehicle detailing.
benefits: Effective, universal spray sealant for all vehicles
Very high water repellent effect (beading & sheeting)
benefits_en: Effective, universal spray sealant for all vehicles
Very high water repellent effect (beading & sheeting)
recommended_usage: Before sealing: Clean the already shiny surface with Menzerna Control Cleaner.
Shake bottle well before use.
Spray two to three sprays onto the Menzerna Premium Microfiber Cloth (blue).
To achieve a perfect result, spread the product with the Menzerna Premium Microfiber Cloth (blue) on the surface to be sealed.
Remove the remaining product after application on the surface with the dry side of the Menzerna Premium Microfiber Cloth (blue).
The vehicle should then be left in a dry place for 2-3 hours, away from direct sunlight.
recommended_usage_en: Before sealing: Clean the already shiny surface with Menzerna Control Cleaner.
Shake bottle well before use.
Spray two to three sprays onto the Menzerna Premium Microfiber Cloth (blue).
To achieve a perfect result, spread the product with the Menzerna Premium Microfiber Cloth (blue) on the surface to be sealed.
Remove the remaining product after application on the surface with the dry side of the Menzerna Premium Microfiber Cloth (blue).
The vehicle should then be left in a dry place for 2-3 hours, away from direct sunlight.

power_lock.description_subtitle: Polymer sealant for all automotive clear coats
power_lock.description_subtitle_en: Polymer sealant for all automotive clear coats
power_lock.description_text: This specialist product with staying power not only offers a long-lasting seal, but also reliably protects against environmental influences. The polymer sealant boasts an unbeatable beading effect, not to mention peerless deep shine. Also suitable as a long-lasting coat sealant for new vehicles.
power_lock.description_text_en: This specialist product with staying power not only offers a long-lasting seal, but also reliably protects against environmental influences. The polymer sealant boasts an unbeatable beading effect, not to mention peerless deep shine. Also suitable as a long-lasting coat sealant for new vehicles.
recommended_usage: Clean the glossy surface with Menzerna Control Cleaner.
Shake the bottle before use and apply the sealant to the Wax Foam Pad.
Apply the sealant using an orbital polishing machine (and the cross-coating method). The product can also be applied by hand using the Hand Polishing Applicator or a microfiber cloth.
Exert light and even pressure while polishing and apply the product with a consistently low rotational speed.

Leave the sealant to dry for 25 to 30 minutes and remove any residual polish with the Premium microfiber cloth, without applying any pressure. Leave the sealant to harden in a protected area for at least 3 hours.
Optionally, you can reapply PLUP after 4 hours for a longer-lasting sealing effect.
recommended_usage_en: Clean the glossy surface with Menzerna Control Cleaner.
Shake the bottle before use and apply the sealant to the Wax Foam Pad.
Apply the sealant using an orbital polishing machine (and the cross-coating method). The product can also be applied by hand using the Hand Polishing Applicator or a microfiber cloth.
Exert light and even pressure while polishing and apply the product with a consistently low rotational speed.

Leave the sealant to dry for 25 to 30 minutes and remove any residual polish with the Premium microfiber cloth, without applying any pressure. Leave the sealant to harden in a protected area for at least 3 hours.
Optionally, you can reapply PLUP after 4 hours for a longer-lasting sealing effect.

sealing_wax.description_text: This auto coat sealant creates a protective, dirt-repellent film. The polishing wax generates deep shine and brilliance on the surface of the coat. The new, improved formulation allows the product to protect and seal your surface even more effectively!
sealing_wax.description_text_en: This auto coat sealant creates a protective, dirt-repellent film. The polishing wax generates deep shine and brilliance on the surface of the coat. The new, improved formulation allows the product to protect and seal your surface even more effectively!
recommended_usage: Clean the glossy surface with Menzerna Control Cleaner.
Shake the bottle and apply the polishing wax to the Wax Foam Pad.
Apply the sealant using an orbital polishing machine (and the cross-coating method). The wax can also be applied by hand using the Hand Polishing Applicator or a microfiber cloth.
Exert light and even pressure while polishing and apply the product with a consistently low rotational speed.
Following application: Leave the sealant to dry for 5 to 10 minutes and remove any residual polish with the Premium microfiber cloth, without applying any pressure.
recommended_usage_en: Clean the glossy surface with Menzerna Control Cleaner.
Shake the bottle and apply the polishing wax to the Wax Foam Pad.
Apply the sealant using an orbital polishing machine (and the cross-coating method). The wax can also be applied by hand using the Hand Polishing Applicator or a microfiber cloth.
Exert light and even pressure while polishing and apply the product with a consistently low rotational speed.
Following application: Leave the sealant to dry for 5 to 10 minutes and remove any residual polish with the Premium microfiber cloth, without applying any pressure.

endless_shine.description_text: Liquid carnauba wax for long-lasting protection, combined with a soft, natural feel and brilliant deep shine. For noticeably smoother surfaces. The high-quality carnauba wax can be easily applied, either with or without a polishing machine.
endless_shine.description_text_en: Liquid carnauba wax for long-lasting protection, combined with a soft, natural feel and brilliant deep shine. For noticeably smoother surfaces. The high-quality carnauba wax can be easily applied, either with or without a polishing machine.
benefits: Suitable for both manual and mechanical application
benefits_en: Suitable for both manual and mechanical application
recommended_usage: Clean the glossy surface with Menzerna Control Cleaner.
Shake the bottle and apply the polishing wax to the Wax Foam Pad.
Apply the sealant using an orbital polishing machine (and the cross-coating method). The wax can also be applied by hand using the Hand Polishing Applicator or a microfiber cloth.
Exert light and even pressure while polishing and apply the product with a consistently low rotational speed.
Following application: Leave the sealant to dry for 5 to 10 minutes and remove any residual polish with the Premium microfiber cloth, without applying any pressure.

Shake the bottle and apply the polishing wax to the Wax Foam Pad.

Following application: Leave the sealant to dry for 5 to 10 minutes and remove any residual polish with the Premium microfiber cloth, without applying any pressure.

premium_backing_plate.description_subtitle: Premium Backing Plate for polishing machines
premium_backing_plate.description_subtitle_en: Premium Backing Plate for polishing machines
premium_backing_plate.description_text: The Menzerna Premium Backing Plate is a flexible, high-quality plate with a powerful hook-and-loop underside. It supports safe and comfortable working on corners, edges, and contours. Suitable for all standard polishing machines. The polishing plate is available in three different sizes to match the Menzerna polishing pads.
premium_backing_plate.description_text_en: The Menzerna Premium Backing Plate is a flexible, high-quality plate with a powerful hook-and-loop underside. It supports safe and comfortable working on corners, edges, and contours. Suitable for all standard polishing machines. The polishing plate is available in three different sizes to match the Menzerna polishing pads.
benefits: Suitable for all polishing pads with a diameter of 95 mm/3.5'', 150 mm/6'', and 180 mm/7''
benefits_en: Suitable for all polishing pads with a diameter of 95 mm/3.5'', 150 mm/6'', and 180 mm/7''
